claim: A local status command can report system state without mutating source files.
counterclaim: There exists a local status execution that mutates source files or omits required evidence.
falsifiers: The command creates or modifies source files.
The output lacks a verifiable local artifact or test reference.
evidence_required: Focused command output or test result.

grader.status_rule: SUPPORTED only after required evidence is present and ActionGate is not BLOCK.
grader.counterexample_rule: FALSIFIED if any falsifier is observed with evidence.
